history.content: No active task or schedule data is currently available (`task_control` and `schedule` are unavailable), so there’s nothing queued that needs immediate action from those systems. Today’s key completed work was the boot/hot-restart routing fix: automated outputs now reliably go to a brand-new unread automated chat session, frontend notifications surface correctly even when another chat is open, duplicate fallback race logic was removed, and backward compatibility was preserved. We left off in a meta-runtime discussion where you were verifying exactly which injected prompt layers/rules I’m following (especially around no-tool casual chat and action-first behavior).
